extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked solo on final climb, held gap to finish line, extending GC lead over BETANCUR and PORTE
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ neutralized BETANCUR's repeated attacks by staying seated to conserve power before launching solo counter on uphill section.
BETANCUR's aggressive multi-attack strategy on climb failed when unable to sustain gap after ROGLIČ's single decisive counter-move.
FUGLSANG positioned for time bonuses at intermediate sprints despite being 2:08 down, suggesting team targeting stage podium not GC.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: controlled repeated attacks while seated then accelerated once to create winning gap, showing superior power management
rider_signals.BETANCUR Carlos: negative: multiple attacks on climb failed to crack ROGLIČ, moved into second GC but couldn't win stage
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: neutral: limited to third overall at 35 seconds, no visible attack attempt on queen stage climb
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: moved to fourth overall at 1:16 but focused on intermediate sprint rather than following decisive climb moves
